title: Git push to remote
summary: Staged and pushed 111 changed/new files from lpos-dashboard to github.com/lp-jordan/lpos main branch (commit 6584493). Excluded .DS_Store and atem-bridge.zip. Covers all accumulated changes since the 4-17-26 commit.

title: Sardius filename collision handling
summary: Added filename conflict detection to the Sardius push flow. The POST API now calls checkSardiusFileExists before starting an upload and returns HTTP 409 with a suggestedName ('filename(1).mp4') if the file already exists and the caller has not acknowledged. The SardiusPushModal handles the 409 by pausing the upload loop and presenting Overwrite / Rename options inline; for batch pushes, each conflicting asset is resolved in sequence before the loop continues.

title: Sardius FTP push feature
summary: Added a Sardius media push workflow accessible from the media asset More Info sidebar. A modal connects to the Akamai FTP watch-folder server, lists the remote directory tree, and lets the user pick a destination, set per-asset metadata (speakers, categories, publish profile), preview the JSON sidecar, and trigger a background FTP upload. After Sardius processes the file, the user pastes the assigned share URL back into LPOS where it is stored and available to copy with one click. Status cycles: none → uploading → queued → ready.
